name: Intel Core i9 13900K 13th Gen Processor
description: Intel Core i9 13900K 13th Gen Processor What is Intel Core i9 13900K 13th Gen Processor price in Pakistan? Intel Core i9 13900K 13th Gen Processor price in Pakistan is Rs.130,000. This high-end CPU features 24 cores (8 Performance + 16 Efficient) and 32 threads with boost frequencies up to 5.8 GHz, delivering top-tier performance for gaming, streaming, and professional workloads.
